nodes.name: file-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: Agent definition for extracting knowledge graph fragments from source files, including rules for code and non-code edges.

nodes.name: graph-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Agent definition for validating knowledge graphs, performing schema checks, referential integrity, and quality assessments.

nodes.name: knowledge-graph-guide.md
nodes.summary: Guide for users to understand the structure, node types, and edge types of the generated knowledge graphs.

nodes.name: project-scanner.md
nodes.summary: Agent definition for scanning codebases to produce file inventories, language detection, and import maps.

nodes.name: tour-builder.md
nodes.summary: Agent definition for designing pedagogical tours through codebases based on graph topology analysis.

nodes.name: auto-update-prompt.md
nodes.summary: Internal hook-triggered prompt for incrementally updating the knowledge graph based on structural changes.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the dashboard web application.

nodes.name: BUILD.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for building and vendoring the tree-sitter-dart WASM artifact.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Main skill definition for the /understand command, orchestrating the multi-phase analysis pipeline.

nodes.name: django.md
nodes.summary: Framework addendum for Django, providing specific file roles, edge patterns, and architectural layers.

nodes.name: python.md
nodes.summary: Language prompt snippet for Python, covering key concepts, import patterns, and common frameworks.
